title: Approval Decision
description: The attributed human decision captured against an approval card (release-spec.md §7.6; model §2 Approval Decision; DD-17). Invariant: no item reaches the publish handoff without exactly one recorded decision (enforced by the executor's approver gate). The reviewer must be a config allowlist member; edits require the same rights as approvals and count as approval (release-spec.md §2.4); reviewer-attached media re-enters the deterministic gate subset (DD-12). All refs are $CONTENT_HOME-relative; absolute paths are forbidden. Structural contract only; instances are instance data and never ship in the repo.

card_ref.description: $CONTENT_HOME-relative reference to the approval card this decision answers.

content_id.description: Content identifier shared across artifacts for this item.

reviewer_id.description: Identifier of the deciding reviewer; MUST be a member of the config reviewer allowlist (DD-17).

action.description: The chosen action (matches the approval card action vocabulary, release-spec.md §7.5).

selected_variant.description: Which variant was approved; required for approve_* actions, absent for reject.

edit_diff.description: The reviewer's edit as a diff against the selected variant; captured as a calibration signal (release-spec.md §2.4). Present only for the edit action; edited text re-enters the deterministic gate subset (DD-12).

attached_media_ref.description: $CONTENT_HOME-relative reference to media the reviewer attached; triggers a DD-12 re-gate before publish. Present only for the attach_media action.

rejection_reason.description: Reviewer's reason for rejection; captured as a calibration signal. Present only for the reject action.
